<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Console\Exception; /** * @author Jérôme Tamarelle <jerome@tamarelle.net> */ class InvalidArgumentException extends \InvalidArgumentException implements ExceptionInterface { /** * @internal */ public static function fromEnumValue(string $name, string $value, array|\Closure $suggestedValues): self { $error = \sprintf('The value "%s" is not valid for the "%s" argument.', $value, $name); if (\is_array($suggestedValues)) { $error .= \sprintf(' Supported values are "%s".', implode('", "', $suggestedValues)); } return new self($error); } }
